base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_7_valley_of_bowser — a tile (level_layout) from 1990 super mario world. Valley of Bowser 1-4 + Valley Ghost House + Valley Fortress + Larry's Castle + Bowser's Castle (Front Door + Back Door, 8 door-rooms) + Iggy's Castle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
